_readme: Observations about how NSE/Indian markets behave. Sector rotations, time-of-day effects, event reactions.

notes.observation: Trump tariff shock (Apr 7) caused Nifty to crash from ~24000 to 22182 in one session. Recovery was sharp — +7.7% in 2 days on 3x average volume. Indicates institutional buy-the-dip behavior after macro shocks.
